Lines.FullText: Represents the status of the reader.

Elements.RawText: Represents the status of the reader.

Lines.FullText: - If the reader is invalid, IReaderStatus::getValid returns false.

Elements.RawText: - If the reader is invalid, IReaderStatus::getValid returns false.

Lines.FullText: - If an event packet was encountered during processing, IReaderStatus::getReadStatus returns ReadStatus::Event

Elements.RawText: - If an event packet was encountered during processing, IReaderStatus::getReadStatus returns ReadStatus::Event

Lines.FullText: - If the reading process is successful, IReaderStatus::getReadStatu returns ReadStatus::Ok, indicating that IReaderStatus::getValid is true and there is no encountered events

Elements.RawText: - If the reading process is successful, IReaderStatus::getReadStatu returns ReadStatus::Ok, indicating that IReaderStatus::getValid is true and there is no encountered events

Tags.RawText:
@param[out] status: Represents the status of the reader.
     * - If the reader is invalid, IReaderStatus::getValid returns false.
     * - If an event packet was encountered during processing, IReaderStatus::getReadStatus returns ReadStatus::Event
     * - If the reading process is successful, IReaderStatus::getReadStatu returns ReadStatus::Ok, indicating that IReaderStatus::getValid is true and there is no encountered events
